description: The corporate communications team needs an 'Official Media Kit' page built for journalists. Create and publish a WordPress page titled 'Official Media Kit' containing introductory text and direct download links for the files in ~/Documents/MediaKit/ (Nimbus_Press_Release.pdf, Nimbus_Brand_Assets.zip, and CEO_Portrait.jpg). Ensure the links point to the raw file URLs rather than attachment pages. Use the following exact link texts: 'Download Press Release' for the PDF, 'Download Brand Assets' for the ZIP, and 'Download CEO Portrait' for the JPG.
